Environmental Protection.summary: King has consistently supported clean energy legislation and voted for environmental protection measures.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate Roll Call, August 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with clean energy funding (Senate Roll Call, August 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: King has supported bipartisan criminal justice reform efforts including sentencing reform.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate Roll Call, December 2018)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: King has voted to protect reproductive rights and access to abortion services.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate Roll Call, February 2022)
Vote to codify Roe v. Wade protections (Senate Roll Call, May 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: King has supported legislation protecting LGBTQ+ rights including marriage equality.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate Roll Call, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Collins has supported some environmental protections while opposing more expansive climate regulations.
voted_for: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with environmental provisions (Senate Roll Call, August 2021)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act climate provisions (Senate Roll Call, August 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Collins has supported bipartisan criminal justice reform legislation.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate Roll Call, December 2018)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Collins opposes federal abortion bans but has had mixed votes on abortion access legislation.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate Roll Call, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Collins has supported protections for LGBTQ+ individuals including marriage equality.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate Roll Call, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Golden has supported some environmental protections while opposing certain climate regulations affecting his district.
voted_for: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (House Roll Call, November 2021)
voted_against: Build Back Better Act with climate provisions (House Roll Call, November 2021)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Golden has taken moderate positions on tax policy, supporting some but not all progressive tax measures.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act (House Roll Call, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Golden has voted to protect reproductive rights and abortion access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House Roll Call, September 2021)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Golden has supported protections for LGBTQ+ individuals.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (House Roll Call, December 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Pingree has been a strong advocate for environmental protection and climate action.
voted_for: Build Back Better Act with climate provisions (House Roll Call, November 2021)
Inflation Reduction Act (House Roll Call, August 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act (House Roll Call, November 2021)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Pingree has consistently supported progressive tax policies and closing tax loopholes.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (House Roll Call, August 2022)

Fresh Food Access.summary: Pingree has championed fresh food access and local agriculture initiatives.
voted_for: Farm Bill reauthorization with nutrition assistance (House Roll Call, 2018)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Pingree has been a strong supporter of reproductive rights and abortion access.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House Roll Call, September 2021)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Pingree has consistently supported LGBTQ+ rights and protections.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (House Roll Call, December 2022)
Equality Act (House Roll Call, February 2021)

Public School Funding.summary: Pingree has supported increased federal funding for public education.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan with education funding (House Roll Call, March 2021)

Environmental Protection.summary: Simmons has supported some conservation measures while opposing certain environmental regulations.
Hepler has supported environmental protection measures in the Maine Legislature.

Small Business Funding.summary: Arata has advocated for small business support and reduced regulatory burdens.
